title: Mother Machree
writer: Rida Johnson Young, Gertrude Orr, Katherine Hilliker
actors: Belle Bennett, Neil Hamilton, Philippe De Lacy
plot: Ellen McHugh, a poor Irish immigrant to America, finds work in a carnival and is thus able to send her son Brian to a fine school. But when her position is found out, the school expels Brian. Mrs. McHugh feels compelled to allow t...
